name: Seven
description: A two-seat, rear-wheel drive sports car first produced in 1973.

name: Seven Superlight
description: A lightweight version of the Seven, introduced in 1978.

name: Caterham 7 Supersport
description: A more luxurious variant of the Seven, produced from 1995 to 2003.

name: Caterham R500
description: A high-performance variant of the Seven, produced from 2007 to 2014.

name: Caterham Seven 620R
description: A high-performance road-legal track car, first produced in 2012.

name: Caterham Seven CSR 260
description: A high-performance version of the Seven, produced from 2013 to 2015.

name: Caterham Seven 485
description: A powerful and lightweight sports car, first produced in 2016.

name: Caterham Seven 620S
description: A track-focused variant of the Seven 485, produced from 2017.

name: Caterham Seven 310
description: A more affordable and accessible version of the Seven, first produced in 2018.
